data.title: Head of Department – Pediatrics (American Board, Arabic Speaker) - Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
Position Overview
  
A prestigious healthcare institution in Qatar is seeking a highly qualified Head of Department for Pediatrics to lead its pediatric division. The ideal candidate must be American Board Certified in Pediatrics and fluent in Arabic, with a strong background in clinical leadership, multidisciplinary collaboration, and patient\-centered care. data.title: Head of IT
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Type:** Full\-time  
**Industry:** Piping Manufacturing

**About the Role**

We are looking for a Head of IT Infrastructure to lead and manage the company’s IT environment, ensuring secure, reliable, and scalable technology services. This role drives IT strategy, oversees cloud and on\-premises systems, networks, and security, and ensures high\-quality end\-user support.
